{{ name }}

{{ role }}

{% if links %}
{# Each entry is `label|url`. Crinja rejects bracket indexing on a parenthesized filter expression (`(... | split())[0]`), and `set` inside a `for` does not survive an inner `if` boundary — so we lean on `first` / `last` to pull the two ends without naming intermediate variables. #} {% for link in links | split(pat=",") %} {{ link | trim | split(pat="|") | first | trim }} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
